content_body: In mid-August, the weather was beautiful: 65 degree evenings and up to high 80s in the afternoon. Our group of two couples enjoyed this property very much! On the first night we sat on the porch for dinner. Day 2 we shopped in Blue Ridge and had lunch at Chester's (great food!) on Main St. Day 3 we went hiking to Sea Creek Falls in the rain. It was so wonderful! Then we drove to The Swinging Bridge, and at night we played Phase 10. We saw several deer families, wild turkeys, and colorful butterflies. Some of our highlights included cooking for one another, hiking, celebrating Jill's 60th birthday, all of the green scenery, the sound of the creek, and seeing the mountains again.
title: Perfect For Our Couples Trip
